hooks.command: & 'HORIZON_SYSTEM_PATH/harness_configs/claude_code/hooks/log_hook_event.ps1' -Event Stop; $s = python 'HORIZON_SYSTEM_PATH/bin/resolve_sound.py' task_complete --harness claude_code; if ($s) { (New-Object Media.SoundPlayer $s).PlaySync() }

& 'HORIZON_SYSTEM_PATH/harness_configs/claude_code/hooks/log_hook_event.ps1' -Event PermissionRequest; $s = python 'HORIZON_SYSTEM_PATH/bin/resolve_sound.py' input_needed --harness claude_code; if ($s) { (New-Object Media.SoundPlayer $s).PlaySync() }

& 'HORIZON_SYSTEM_PATH/harness_configs/claude_code/hooks/log_hook_event.ps1' -Event StopFailure; $s = python 'HORIZON_SYSTEM_PATH/bin/resolve_sound.py' api_error --harness claude_code; if ($s) { (New-Object Media.SoundPlayer $s).PlaySync() }
